summary:
The sphenoid骨的形状类似于“带有展开翅膀的蝙蝠”，因此在给定选项中，唯一符合此描述的是蝶骨。最终答案是： \boxed{蝶骨}
The sphenoid bone matches the description of “a bat with extended wings,” making it the correct choice from the provided options. Thus, the answer is \boxed{\text{sphenoid}}.
